stemHtml: How does the Flight Warning Computer assist the flight crew regarding engine parameters?

options.a: Analysation and trend prediction will prevent any values from exceeding certain threshold values.
options.b: Automatically detects failures and performs required actions, such as engine shutdown.
options.c: Upon request by the crew, all critical values exceeding certain thresholds will be displayed.
options.d: Exceedance of certain thresholds can trigger main and subsequent events and programmed actions.
